channel.title: Discover South Lake Union Events
channel.description: Upcoming events for Discover South Lake Union Events

item.title: History Café: Seattle Mystic Al Hubbard
item.description:
Wednesday, March 18, 2026 at 6:30 PM

Location: MOHAI, South Lake Union, Seattle, WA

Join Brad Holden, author of Seattle Mystic Alfred M. Hubbard for a discussion of one of Seattle’s most mysterious figures.

Event details

item.title: Bloodworks NW Blood Drive
item.description:
Thursday, March 19, 2026 at 10 AM

Location: Amazon Oscar & Fairview Market Hall, South Lake Union, Seattle, WA

Donate in February and March to Win a 3-Night Trip for Two to Maui.

item.title: Naturally Seattle Brand Showcase
item.description:
Thursday, March 19, 2026 at 11 AM

Location: Fairview Market Hall, South Lake Union, Seattle, WA

An assortment of local, all-natural brands will be popping up in the Market Hall Wed, March 19 from 11am to 2:30pm.

item.title: Guest Chef Night: Chef Matt Lewis & Dre Neeley
item.description:
Thursday, March 19, 2026 at 5 PM

Location: FareStart Restaurant, South Lake Union, Seattle, WA

Please join us as we welcome Chef Matt Lewis of Where Ya At Matt & Chef Dre Neeley of Gravy for a special evening as we celebrate our...

item.title: Trailside Bike Repair Workshop
item.description:
Thursday, March 19, 2026 at 6 PM

Location: REI, South Lake Union, Seattle, WA

Don’t let a surprise on the trail cancel your ride! Before you hit a snag on your next ride, learn the basics of trailside repair so...

item.title: "Field Notes" Opening Reception
item.description:
Thursday, March 19, 2026 at 6 PM

Location: Gage Academy of Art, South Lake Union, Seattle, WA

item.title: JazzED Downbeat
item.description:
Thursday, March 19, 2026 at 6:30 PM

Location: Seattle JazzED, South Lake Union, Seattle, WA

item.title: Nature & Landscape Photography with John Greengo
item.description:
Saturday, March 21, 2026 at 12 PM

Location: Glazer's Camera, South Lake Union, Seattle, WA

Amazing and beautiful landscapes are all around us; they are a joy to experience, but a challenge to capture in a simple photo.

item.title: EASE Pop-Up
item.description:
Sunday, March 22, 2026 at 1 PM

Location: 9th & Thomas, South Lake Union, Seattle, WA

EASE is a certified Black-owned, woman-owned brand and the creator of the USPTO patent-pending Protective Mouth Grill (PMG).

item.description:
Sunday, March 29, 2026 at 12:30 PM

Location: Glazer's Camera, South Lake Union, Seattle, WA
